diagrams.title: Contiguous Memory Allocation
diagrams.description: Shows memory divided into allocated blocks and free holes in contiguous arrangement
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how contiguous allocation works and how external fragmentation occurs

diagrams.title: Fixed Partitioning
diagrams.description: Memory divided into fixed-size partitions at system startup
diagrams.purpose: Illustrating internal fragmentation in fixed partitioning

diagrams.title: Paging Address Translation
diagrams.description: Virtual address to physical address translation using page table
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how paging translation works mechanically

diagrams.title: Page Table Entry Format
diagrams.description: Structure of a page table entry with valid bit, frame number, protection bits
diagrams.purpose: Understanding what information is stored in page table entries

diagrams.title: Segmentation Example
diagrams.description: Logical view vs physical view of memory segments
elements: Logical: Code segment, Data segment, Stack segment, Heap segment
Physical: Same segments scattered in memory with segment table mapping
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how segmentation provides logical memory view with physical scatter

diagrams.title: Virtual Memory Concept
diagrams.description: Shows physical RAM and disk working together to give illusion of larger memory
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how virtual memory extends physical memory using disk
